name: Sparse Table (Range Minimum Query)
description: Preprocess an array in O(n log n) for O(1) range minimum queries using overlapping power-of-2 ranges.
intuition: For each position i and power j, store the minimum of the range [i, i + 2^j - 1]. Any range [l, r] can be answered in O(1) by overlapping two precomputed ranges of length 2^⌊log2(r-l+1)⌋.
